'''Nat-Sem''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] prior to the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Taking [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Roan Shryne]] as his apprentice, he trained the boy to Knighthood before being killed in the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of Geonosis]] at the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Nat-Sem was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] who was discovered by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. During his time in service to the Republic, Master Nat-Sem selected the young [[Roan Shryne]] as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], training him in the ways of the Jedi as he had been taught. Traveling [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] together, Shryne eventually learned all he could from Nat-Sem and passed his own Trials before becoming a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Going their separate ways, Nat-Sem and Shryne fought side-by-side in the [[Petranaki arena]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] when tensions between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] erupted in a [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|conflict]] there. Fighting bravely alongside members of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] and their brother and sister Jedi, Nat-Sem succumbed to blasterfire shortly after [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] [[Sai cha/Legends|decapitated]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]. Watching his former Master fall, Shryne went onto survive the war and the initial stages of the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]] before falling victim to [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader's]] blade on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]].<ref name="DL" />
